Building configuration...

  
Current configuration : 3437 bytes
!
! Last configuration change at 16:06:22 UTC Wed May 13 2026 by admin
!
version 15.6
service timestamps debug datetime msec
service timestamps log datetime msec
no service password-encryption
!
hostname router1-ios
!
boot-start-marker
boot-end-marker
!
!
enable secret 5 $1$AXrC$jYEIqFgeHuihpq6uLIYaM0
!
no aaa new-model
ethernet lmi ce
!
!
!
mmi polling-interval 60
no mmi auto-configure
no mmi pvc
mmi snmp-timeout 180
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
no ip domain lookup
ip domain name lab.com
ip cef
no ipv6 cef
!
multilink bundle-name authenticated
!
domain lab.com
!
!
!
username cisco privilege 15 secret 5 $1$ShRw$AUx16YYZ.JymDosF7qnqj/
username admin privilege 15 secret 5 $1$ZVtC$VM1/VKIUUOhbt/xVLFzo7/
!
redundancy
!
!
! 
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 10.255.1.100 255.255.255.0
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 no ip address
 shutdown
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 no ip address
 shutdown
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/3
 ip address 10.10.10.1 255.255.255.0
 shutdown
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
ip forward-protocol nd
!
!
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh server algorithm encryption aes256-ctr aes192-ctr aes128-ctr
!
!
!
!
control-plane
!
banner exec ^C

* Technical Advisory Center. Any use or disclosure, in whole or in part, *

line con 0
 exec-timeout 0 0
 logging synchronous
 login local
line aux 0
 transport input all
line vty 0 4
 login local
 transport input ssh
!
no scheduler allocate
ntp server 1.1.1.1
ntp server 8.8.9.9
ntp server 8.8.8.8o
!
